{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Garrylondryth
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Garrylondryth]] is the [[Rootfather]] and was once the right hand of the [[Dragon King]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
